category_sources: Official Tokyo Cabinet homepage describes a DBM-style database library with hash table, B+ tree, and fixed-length array records.
source_facts.description says it is a lightweight database library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Tokyo Cabinet.
docs_sources: Official Fundamental Specifications page is the primary API and installation documentation.
Official homepage lists Tokyo Cabinet documents and source packages.
repo_sources: Official Tokyo Cabinet homepage lists documents and source packages, but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes DBM-style key/value records and C APIs.
source_facts.description identifies a lightweight database library.
